tool_args.label: Joint LIRR and Metro-North Committee Meeting

payload.event_name: Regular Meeting Joint LIRR and Metro-North Committees
payload.description: Regular meeting of the Joint Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Committees

evidence_refs.source_quote: Minutes of the Regular Meeting Joint Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Committees Monday, June 26, 2023

payload.description: 155th running of the Belmont Stakes; LIRR carried approximately 22,900 fans

evidence_refs.source_quote: on Saturday, June 10, forty-eight thousand spectators watched Arcangelo capture the 155th running of the Belmont Stakes

payload.description: President Rinaldi and Metro-North SVP Justin Vonashek accepted APTA Gold Awards for Safety at the APTA Rail Conference in Pittsburgh

evidence_refs.source_quote: On June 13, at the American Public Transportation Association ("APTA") Rail Conference in Pittsburgh, she and Metro-North's Senior Vice President Justin Vonashek proudly accepted a pair of APTA's prestigious annual Gold Awards for Safety

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

payload.description: International Level Crossing Awareness Day (ILCAD) outreach events at crossings across LIRR and Metro-North territories

evidence_refs.source_quote: another safety event on both railroads, which took place on June 15 in observance of International Level Crossing Awareness Day ("ILCAD")

payload.description: LIRR set a new one-day pandemic-era ridership record of 242,162 riders

evidence_refs.source_quote: The current record is 242,162, which was set on June 21

payload.description: Metro-North broke its one-day post-COVID ridership mark with 224,371 riders

evidence_refs.source_quote: Metro-North also broke its one-day, post-COVID ridership mark on May 23 and again on June 20 by more than 10,000 riders with the current record of 224,371 riders

tool_args.label: Metro-North Bikes on AM Reverse Peak Trains Begins

payload.description: Metro-North made a customer service adjustment to allow bikes on AM reverse peak trains operating out of Grand Central Terminal

evidence_refs.source_quote: On Metro-North, we are making a customer service adjustment in alignment with our environmental sustainability goals to allow bikes on A.M. reverse peak trains that operate out of Grand Central Terminal ("GCT"). This began last Monday, June 19

payload.description: Opening of Grand Central Madison (GCM) providing a 41% increase in overall LIRR service

evidence_refs.source_quote: It has been a very historic year for LIRR with the opening of GCM in February, providing a 41% increase in overall LIRR service

payload.description: Metro-North introduced new schedules to accommodate summer construction projects

evidence_refs.source_quote: Metro-North introduced new schedules on June 11 to accommodate its summer construction projects

payload.description: Exercise of option under contract with Siemens Mobility, Inc. for design, manufacturing, testing, and delivery of six dual-mode diesel locomotives for CDOT, funded by CDOT

evidence_refs.source_quote: MTA Board approval will be requested to exercise an option under a contract that resulted from a competitive Request for Proposal ("RFP") in the amount of $78.8 million to Siemens Mobility, Inc. for the design, manufacturing, testing, and delivery of six dual-mode diesel locomotives

payload.description: Six-weekend project spanning July and August to install new running rail, third rail, switches, and 12,000 new concrete ties between Huntington and Port Jefferson

tool_args.label: Hudson Line High-Level Platform Edge Renewal

payload.description: Renewing edges of selected high-level 1980s-era platforms along the Hudson Line; work progressed to New Hamburg in an 11-mile, single-track block between Beacon and Poughkeepsie; completion by September 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: the ongoing project to renew the edges of selected high-level 1980s-era platforms along the Hudson Line. The work has progressed to New Hamburg in an 11-mile, single-track block between Beacon and Poughkeepsie. This phase of the refurbishment work will be completed by September
